results.title: Public database endpoint
results.description: The managed database endpoint is reachable from the public internet.
results.impact: Sensitive data is exposed to internet-based attacks and credential stuffing.
results.remediation: Disable public accessibility and restrict access to private subnets.

results.title: IAM user with wildcard admin policy
results.description: An IAM user is attached to a policy granting Action: * on Resource: *.
results.impact: A leaked credential would grant full control of the account.
results.remediation: Replace wildcard permissions with scoped, least-privilege policies.

results.title: CloudTrail not enabled in all regions
results.remediation: Enable a multi-region trail with log file validation.
